productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Puma Evo White Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Evo shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes are great or regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and protection Perforations on sides and mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name printed on the tongue and cat logo behind collar Cupsole for added comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfot EVa midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole for greater traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movement Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet
